title: Xandll
description: A crazy Modpack with weapons, artifacts, new structures & more for you and your friends!
body:
Welcome to Xandll, a Modpack for endless adventures and exploration trips. Your creativity in building big factories, zeppelins, trains, ships and other constructions has no limits. Find artifacts for upgrading your character.


**Key Features:**

Engineering Marvels with Create & Add-ons: Dive into the Create mod and its extensions like Create: Crafts & Additions and Create Ore Excavation. Build intricate machines, automate tasks, and mine resources more efficiently. Additional mods like Create Deco and Lazy Engines offer new ways to decorate and power your factories.

Immersive Exploration: Embark on adventures through enhanced dimensions with BetterEnd and BetterNether, each enriched with Delight mods that add unique foods and crafting opportunities. Discover natural beauty with Naturalist, Terralith and Ecologics, which introduce vibrant wildlife and environmental challenges.

Agriculture and Cuisine: Enjoy deep farming and cooking systems with Farmer's Delight Refabricated, Croptopia, and their various add-ons. Grow diverse crops and cook exotic dishes.

Storage and Organization: Stay organized with the Extended Drawers and Expanded Storage mod, which help you manage large inventories seamlessly.

Visual and Performance Enhancements: Enhance the game's beauty with Complementary Shader: Unbound, and boost performance with Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and other optimization mods. Utilize Xaero's Minimap and World Map for navigational ease.

Airships and Sky Adventures: Build and pilot massive ships with Valkyrien Skies and its add-on Eureka! Ships, allowing you to explore the world from above.






If the modpack regulary crashes, try to allow more RAM Usage in the settings.
